name: golang-github-chzyer-readline-dev
title: golang-github-chzyer-readline-dev
summary: Readline is a pure go implementation for a GNU-Readline like library
description:
Readline is a pure go implementation for a GNU-Readline like library
Readline supports multiple platforms (Windows, OSX, GNU/Linux), and enables
applications to provide a terminal user interface that is able to dynmically
interact with the user on one terminal line.
